title: Gree GMV6 HR status and maintenance codes
description: Manual-bound Chapter 3 Error Indication catalog for GMV6 HR status codes.
sourceName: Gree GMV6 HR DC Inverter VRF Units Service Manual
notes: GMV6 HR service manual import scope for ED-24E.3. Includes n2 from Chapter 3 troubleshooting section 2.135 because it is described outside the Error Indication table. Do not mix with plain GMV6, GMV X, GMV9 Flex, or GMV Mini packages.
